pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and receive security/bug fixes.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains set to 17, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.
